message:
perf(benchmarks): add SIMD for FILTER and AGGREGATE operations

Add Vec4 SIMD operations:
- simdFilterCount: 4-wide comparison + popCount
- simdSum: 4-wide addition + horizontal reduce

Results show ~2x improvement on FILTER, but main bottleneck
is file I/O not computation. DuckDB still 3-4x faster due to
optimized Parquet column pruning and memory-mapped I/O.
